chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2527 of 2016 CP D 4374 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.17251/2016. 2. For hearing of CMA No.13901/2016. 3. For hearing of CMA No.13902/2016. 4. For hearing of CMA No.13903/2016. 5. For hearing of CMA No.12171/2016. 6. For hearing of main case. 17.03.2025 Mr. Rehman Aziz Malik, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 2527 of 2016. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Fahad Hussain Arijo, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Sumaya Kalwar, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. It is jointly submitted that the assessment order has been passed in the subject facts and circumstances, hence, these petitions have become infructuous and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
